title: Origins: Wormlight
description: An origin that uses its inner vibrancy to guide it through caverns.
body:
# 💡 Wormlight **(Impact 2 Origin)** *Alight like lanterns and adorned with luminous wings, these fluttery fireflies use the their inner glow to guide them through caves.* ## • Powerlist •
🕯️ Candlelight You are connected to an essence called Candlelight, fueling your abilities.
Info As you gain Candlelight, your ability to see through the dark increases, and your footsteps become silenced.
💎 Eternal Expedition Candlelight originates in the glow of berries and the sparkles of ores, and you must harvest it from these sources.
Info Stone gives traces of Candlelight when mined, ores give lots of Candlelight when mined and glow berries yield a bit of Candlelight. Ores and stone only give Candlelight if you mine them without Silk Touch.
🏮 Lantern Light: Primary Ability By using the light of your body, you can continuously float forwards, allowing you to phase through blocks. You will lose Candlelight over time while this power is active.
📡 Ruby Radar: Secondary Ability You can release a burst of light, pushing entities away from the location and coating any nearby ores in a glowing essence.
Info This costs a large amount of Candlelight, and will shoot you slightly backwards if activated above a block.
✨ Nifty Sparkles You can repair items with raw ores by clicking them on top of the desired item. More durability will be restored based on the quality of the ore.
Info You can use raw ores to bloom glow berries, acting as if they were bonemeal.
🫠 Melting Sunlight melts away your Candlelight. Without Candlelight, you burst into flames while exposed to the sun.
Info Depletion of Candlelight is mitigated by leather/gold helmets at the cost of durability.
🔥 Singed Sunlight melts away your Candlelight. Without Candlelight, you burst into flames while exposed to the sun.
🪲 Arthropod You react to the Bane of Arthropods enchant.
📖 Enlighten Me [LORE] The depths of darkness call your curiosity. Check your advancements for Wormlight to uncover the 4 tomes that tale the story.
## • Additional • Created for the Dead and Buried jam, and Ruby Radar couldn't have been made without null.arbiter!
